mapper.select:
SELECT t.id, u.writer, t.title, t.guecontents, t.writedate, t.view_count as viewCount FROM guestable as t
JOIN gueuser u ON t.user_id = u.user_id
t.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
u.writer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
t.guecontents LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
t.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR t.guecontents LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY t.writedate ASC
ORDER BY t.viewCount DESC
ORDER BY t.writedate DESC
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT t.id, u.writer, t.title, t.guecontents, t.writedate, t.view_count as viewCount FROM guestable as t JOIN gueuser as u ON t.user_id = u.user_id WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM guestable t JOIN gueuser u u.user_id = t.user_id
t.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
u.writer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
t.guecontents LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
t.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR t.guecontents LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
mapper.update: UPDATE guestable SET view_count = view_count+1 WHERE id = #{id}
